title: Watchdog City Configuration
description: Contract for instantiating a full Watchdog municipal stack for any city. All SSM paths must exist in the target AWS account before cdk deploy.

city.description: Human-readable identity of the city. Used in prompts, email subjects, and CloudWatch dashboard names.

id.description: Slug used as AWS resource prefix and stack name suffix. Lowercase, no spaces. e.g. 'begles', 'bordeaux', 'paris-14'.

name.description: Display name of the city. e.g. 'Bègles'.

label.description: Full brand name of the civic observatory for this city. Used as Brevo sender name and in prompts. e.g. "L'Observatoire de Bègles".

citizen_label.description: Demonym used in Gemini prompts to refer to citizens. e.g. 'les Béglaises et Béglais', 'les Bordelais'.

timezone.description: IANA timezone for display purposes. e.g. 'Europe/Paris'.

scraping.description: All configuration needed by the Orchestrator Lambda to scrape the city website.

cms_type.description: CMS type. Determines which CityScraper Go implementation is used. 'custom' requires all selectors to be fully specified.

deliberations_list_url.description: Full URL of the page listing all council deliberations.

next_council_url.description: Full URL of the page showing the next council session date.

selectors.description: CSS selectors used by the scraper. For known cms_type values, defaults are applied by the scraper — only override here if the site deviates from the CMS standard.

oneOf.description: Ordered list of fallback selectors tried in sequence until a non-empty match is found.

category_mapping.description: Maps raw category strings (lowercased, partial match) to normalized category names. '_default' key is mandatory and used when no match is found.

schedule.description: EventBridge cron schedule for the Orchestrator trigger.

cron_hour_utc.description: UTC hour (0-23). Convert from local time. Paris = local - 1 or 2 depending on DST.

domain.description: DNS and TLS configuration. The ACM certificate must already exist in us-east-1 (CloudFront requirement) before deploying.

acm_certificate_arn_ssm.description: SSM Parameter Store path containing the ACM certificate ARN. Must be pre-populated before cdk deploy.

email.description: Email identities. All domains must be verified in AWS SES before sending.

sender_contact.description: From address for the contact form emails sent to admin.

sender_transactional.description: From address for subscription confirmation emails.

admin.description: SSM path containing the admin email address (contact form destination). Stored in SSM to avoid committing PII.

ses_identity_domain.description: SES verified domain used to scope the ses:SendEmail IAM policy. e.g. 'lobservatoiredebegles.fr'.

brevo.description: Brevo account and list configuration. All IDs refer to resources in the Brevo account whose API key is stored at api_key_ssm.

api_key_ssm.description: SSM path for the Brevo API key. Must be a SecureString.

list_id.description: Brevo contact list ID for newsletter subscribers.

confirmation_template_id.description: Brevo transactional email template ID for subscription confirmation.

newsletter_template_id.description: Brevo email campaign template ID for the newsletter.

sender_name.description: Display name shown in email clients as the sender. e.g. "L'Observatoire de Bègles".

api_key_ssm.description: SSM path for the Gemini API key. Can point to a shared key across cities or a per-city key.

worker_model.description: Gemini model used by the Worker Lambda (PDF analysis). e.g. 'gemini-2.5-flash'.

aggregator_model.description: Gemini model used by the Aggregator Lambda (council synthesis). e.g. 'gemini-2.5-pro'.

notifier_model.description: Gemini model used by the Notifier Lambda (newsletter generation). e.g. 'gemini-2.5-flash'.

existing_s3_bucket.description: Name of a pre-existing S3 bucket to import instead of creating a new one. Omit for new deployments — CDK will create the bucket.

resource_prefix.description: Prefix for all named AWS resources (DynamoDB tables, SQS queues, etc.). Convention: watchdog-{city.id}.
